feed.title: SAP Community - BW SAP HANA Data Warehousing
feed.subtitle: BW SAP HANA Data Warehousing Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Can anyone guide me how to post customer incoming payments through bapi code in sap?
SAP BW - Inventory Data Load ADSO
entry.content:
Hello Guru's
Currently we have two data flows for inventory.. one is the old process through infocubes and recently we created new adso's dataflows.
My client wants to maintain both infocube data flow as well new adso dataflow .
Interms of data loading. The standard process
We will lock the users, clear the delta queues and load the infocube dataflow first.
For loading new dataflow to adso..
Should I run the Bx then bf and um ? If I do will the inventory totals through old dataflow through infocube is disrupted / will not match against ecc?

How to handle this data loading process??

Thank you very much.

entry.title: what is subsequent credit note in miro
Authorization privileges between BW4HANA and HANA database
entry.content:
We are setting for our company all the security task that we need in order to fill the requeriments.

We are facing some problem casuistic, we have for the different users(200) 6 differents infoobject that are relevant of authorization. For each infoobject we have 100 possible different values.

The purpose of this its to consume this privilege in HANA database by Analytical privileges so we need to replicate the authorization created in BW on our HANA layer.

The way that we are creating this scenario is one row for each combination,(screenshot)

Is there any other way to set this because we are going to have thousands of rows.

#BW4HANA #ANALYTICALPRIVILEGE

entry.title: how duplicate vendor invoice handled in SAP
entry.content:
Hello,

How duplicate vendor invoice check handled by SAP.

entry.title: calculated key figure, fixed aggregation by characteristic
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

i have from a sales ADSO (Advanced DataStore Object) in an SAP BW/4HANA environment. This dataset is structured to track sales related to individual articles. Each article is categorized under a 'Universe' (a group of articles), and each 'Universe' falls under a broader category called 'Segment'.

with a query, i need a key figure that aggregate the sales value ONLY on the Univers level. 

for the example below, it should calculate the sales value of spring and display it against the sales value of all articales without being influenced by the drill down in the query.

even if a sub articale is added (MCVT) to the query the sales value total shouldn't change

how can i achieve this with a calculated key figure on a composite provider?

 

thank you for your helo

entry.title: Gateway connection created
entry.content:
we have issue with Gateway connection from Rep server to Ase server.

when we login to rep server and execute the ("connect to rssd") statement, we were able to connect to Ase server without any issues.

we are facing the issue while we are trying to establish the connection thru JDBC. As soon as, ("connect to rssd") statement is executed, it is throwing error as gateway connection created and getting terminated. ( if we execute only replication commands (admin who) without connect statement it is working)

is there any approach for JDBC connection?

is there any thing we have to mention in interface file?

is there any this change in connection string ?

entry.title: Ways to create persistent data in SAP BW/4HANA
entry.content: What are how we can create persistent data in SAP BW/4HANA?

entry.title: SAP Analysis: How to filter different reports sharing the same Datasource
entry.content:
I am using the SAP Analysis Office Add-In in Microsoft Excel.

I created two reports based on the same Datasource (I created the second via the components tab, selected the datasource, right clicked and selected Insert Crosstab).

However, changing filters for one report always changes the filters for the other report as well. Please assist by pointig me into the correct direction so that different filters can be set.

The idea is to have multipe crosstabs showing different information but using the same datasource. When changing the period via prompt my expectation is that all reports using this Datasource will update and display the figures of the chosen period.

entry.title: SAP BW Analysis Authorizations on the ADSO data?
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

I would like to understand, if it is possible to have the SAP BW Analysis Authorization concept on the ADSO data i.e. without creating the Composite provider or query?

 

There is an external system connected to BW which directly access the ADSO tables to retrieve the data. It is required to enable the data authorizations on the ADSO data.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Hana query
entry.content:
Hlo everyone 

This is regarding the stock report query. In this query, I have included where conditions to retrieve data from a specific date range and select a particular warehouse. However, when we run the query, it's reflecting values from every warehouse. Kindly review the query for any errors mentioned below.

Thank you in advance! 😁

entry.title: BW Query Views as Personalized Favorites?
entry.content:
Help Needed.

We want to transition our users from BEx Web to UI5 Portal and Analysis for Office - Excel. However, large numbers of users like using BEx Web favorites, variants, and bookmarks for personal task efficiency.

Unfortunately, when using Save as Query View, all views seem to go to a general directory where user see and EDIT everyone else's query views. Not an acceptable replacement for BEx query favorites, variants, and bookmarks .

Is there an easy way for users to create a personalized list of personalized favorites? Preferably only visible to the individual user, but sharable?

Thanks, John Hawk

entry.title: InfoObject Date Format
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

In my aDSO, there is a custom date InfoObject formatted as DDMMYYYY. However, in the query section, users need to filter this InfoObject by MMYYYY.

How would you approach to solving this problem?

entry.title: How to update sequence number /SCWM/STOP_SEQ in header of outbound delivery in EWM
entry.content: I have created TU from /n/scwm/tu and at the time of assignment of outbound delivery , I would like to update sequence number. Please let me know which BADI I can use and in which table I can see entry.

entry.title: Calculation Procedure
entry.content: what is calculation procedure in vistex and how it is useful for rebate calculations

entry.title: How to pass 0calyear based on ycalmonth on cube using customer exit variable?
entry.content:
Helli Everyone,

I have a requirement that to pass 0calyear based on ycalmonth on cube using customer exit variable. In cube we have data as below.

Version 700 data in cube

OpCoVersionYCALMONTH0CALYEAR0CALMONTH2Quantity
poland70012.2023202312150
poland70012.202320241160
poland70012.202320242170

Version 100 data in cube

OpCoVersion0CALMONTH0CALYEAR0CALMONTH2Quantity
poland10012.2023202312180
poland1001.202420241190

In the bex query created a YCALMONTH based variable of manual input. If user enters 12.2023 as YCALMONTH, it means we are having 0CALYEAR's are 2023 and 2024 for YCALMONTH.

In for V100 if we have 2023 and 2024 as 0CALYEAR.

Question: In LY column how to pass 0calyear's based on ycalmonth's - 0calyear's on cube using customer exit variable?

 

Report
columns - 0CALYEAR2023 20242024
columns - version700100700100
rows - CYLYCYLY
 150180160190
   170 

So, how to write a customer exit variable to fetch 0calyear's of specific ycalmonth on cube and those 0calyear's: 2023, 2024 in V100 to pass to a variable.
BW SAP HANA Data Warehousing

BW Business Explorer (SAP BEx)

entry.title: How is BIREQU_***** job getting triggered
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement where in we need to stop sending data to SAP BW from SAP ECC system. I think the data is going because of this job that starts with BIREQU_ . But I dont know how the job is getting created. Everyday the variant is different and name last part is different. 

Could you please help me in knowing how to stop this job from getting created. How to stop data flow to SAP BW.

entry.title: Paste multiple values to the table by VBA
entry.content:
Hello!

I need to paste the multiple values from Excel to the table control using VBA.

The data is being pasted only by the last visible row, I cannot paste them all, cannot even do it manually (I think it should be possible as clipboard, but cannot find it in this table).

I have found here solutions like Clipboard method but I am not able to use them, because it is not VBA and I do not know this programming language.

Can someone please help me with that problem?

entry.title: Upgrade : From SAP BW/4HANA 2.0 Sp10 to SAP BW/4HANA 2023 Version
entry.content:
Hello All,

Our client is planning to upgrade the BW application from : BW/4HANA 2.0 SP10 to BW/4HANA 2023.

We would like to collect the key information's like below as part of our analysis , Could you please help me with the information which will help us for the same.

- Whether we need to migrate it to version 2021 first or directly migrated to version 2023

- What are all the existing functionalities or objects getting impacted with newer releases?

- Any manual/automated adjustments required post upgrade?

- From BW Development perspective - Do we need adjust modelling objects post upgrade ?

 

Thanks,

Kiran

entry.title: Adding /POSDW/TLOGF_EXT table attribute to 0RT_PA_TRAN_CONTROL DS
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Requirement :

I have a scenario of adding one of the attribute which is present in extension table /POSDW/TLOGF_EXT to 0RT_PA_TRAN_CONTROL DS. Did anyone has experience on how to achieve this req. 

 

Regards,

Praveen.
